name: Oscar Adimi
title: Senior Data Scientist | Full stack AI Engineer | AI Content Creator
base_skills: Programming & Backend: Python (Pandas, NumPy, Scikit-learn), SQL, JavaScript, TypeScript, FastAPI, REST APIs, API Development, Object-Oriented Programming (OOP), Git, Testing (Unit/Integration)

Machine Learning: Supervised Learning, Unsupervised Learning, Classification, Regression, Clustering, Feature Engineering, Model Training, Model Evaluation, Hyperparameter Tuning, Ensemble Methods (Random Forest, XGBoost, LightGBM), Dimensionality Reduction (PCA, t-SNE), Model Interpretability (SHAP, LIME)
Deep Learning & NLP: Neural Networks, Deep Learning, Natural Language Processing (NLP), Text Processing, Sequence Modeling, Transformer Models, Transfer Learning, Tokenization, Embeddings

LLMs & AI Systems: Large Language Models (LLMs), LLMOps, LangChain, Autogen, Promptflow, Prompt Engineering, Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), Vector Databases (FAISS, Pinecone), Semantic Search, AI Agents, LLM Evaluation

Data Engineering & Cloud: Data Pipelines, ETL Processes, Data Ingestion, Data Transformation, Azure Synapse Analytics, Azure Data Factory, Data Warehousing, Azure Machine Learning, Azure Databricks, Data Lakes
Analytics & Visualization: Exploratory Data Analysis (EDA), Statistical Analysis, Predictive Modeling, Data Visualization, Dashboarding, Business Intelligence, Power BI, Tableau, Data Storytelling
Deployment & Systems: Model Deployment, Production Systems, Scalable System Design, Performance Optimization, CI/CD Concepts, Docker, Kubernetes, MLflow, Model Monitoring, Model Drift Detection
Big Data & Distributed Systems: Apache Spark (PySpark), Distributed Computing, Batch Processing, Stream Processing, Kafka, Data Lake Architecture
Statistics & Experimentation: Hypothesis Testing, A/B Testing, Bayesian Statistics, Time Series Analysis, Experimental Design, Statistical Inference
Collaboration & Business: Stakeholder Communication, Cross-functional Collaboration, Requirements Analysis, Data-driven Decision Making, Business Strategy Alignment

experience.title: Senior Data Scientist
base_bullets: Developed and maintained end-to-end machine learning systems using Python frameworks and Azure technologies, delivering scalable analytics solutions that generated actionable insights and supported strategic decision-making across business units.

Developed and enhanced data pipelines using Azure Synapse and Azure Data Factory, improving data ingestion and transformation processes and ensuring reliable, high-quality data availability for analytics and modeling.

Built supervised and unsupervised machine learning models using statistical and algorithmic techniques, generating insights that improved operational efficiency and supported business optimization initiatives.

Translated analytical findings into clear and actionable business insights, working closely with stakeholders to align technical solutions with business objectives and improve decision-making processes.
Developed LLM-powered applications using LangChain, Autogen, and Promptflow, integrating backend workflows and APIs to improve automation and streamline AI-driven processes.

Collaborated with software engineers to deploy machine learning models into production systems using FastAPI, ensuring scalability, maintainability, and reliable performance in enterprise environments.
Led data preparation efforts including data cleaning and feature engineering, improving data quality and increasing model accuracy and robustness across machine learning workflows.
Developed predictive models for pricing optimization, contributing to a 2% increase in profit and improving business performance through data-driven strategies.
Built models to analyze loss patterns and trends using statistical techniques, contributing to a 3% improvement in loss ratios and strengthening risk management strategies.
Monitored and improved machine learning model performance using iterative evaluation and tuning techniques, ensuring consistent performance and adaptability to changing data conditions.
Analyzed large datasets from multiple sources using exploratory data analysis and statistical methods, identifying trends and insights that supported data-driven decision-making.
Presented analytical insights and recommendations to technical and non-technical stakeholders, ensuring clear communication and increasing adoption of data-driven approaches.
Mentored junior team members through knowledge sharing and code reviews, improving team performance and promoting best practices in data science and engineering.
Improved data workflows and system performance using cloud-based tools and optimization techniques, increasing efficiency and scalability across analytics systems.
Supported enterprise data science strategy by contributing to roadmap discussions and aligning machine learning solutions with business priorities and long-term goals.
